articles.title: Beverley Callard Leaves TV Show Because of Health
articles.summary: Beverley Callard is an actress who had to leave a TV show called I'm A Celebrity... South Africa. She felt sick and passed out in the jungle camp. Later, she found out she has breast cancer. On the show, she was sad to leave because she wanted to finish and prove older women can do tough things. Her friends on the show supported her and said her health is important. Beverley is now fighting cancer and says she will beat it. This story shows how health can change plans and the importance of support from friends.

articles.title: A Surprising Discovery in Magnetic Materials
articles.summary: Scientists found a special material that they thought was a quantum spin liquid, but it turned out to be something new. Quantum spin liquids are materials that act in weird ways because of tiny quantum effects, like shifting between different states. This material, called cerium magnesium hexalluminate, showed signs of being a quantum spin liquid because it had no clear magnetic order and many possible states. However, when researchers looked closer using tools like neutron scattering, they discovered it wasn't a quantum spin liquid. Instead, it has a weak boundary between two magnetic behaviors, allowing ions to mix ferromagnetic and anti-ferromagnetic arrangements. This creates many low energy states that look similar to a quantum spin liquid but don't change once settled. The study, led by Rice University, reminds us that materials can be tricky and surprising, even when they seem to match what we expect.

articles.title: Math Rule Broken by Donut Shapes
articles.summary: For over 150 years, a math rule by Pierre Ossian Bonnet said that if you know two things about a surface—how distances work and how it bends—you can figure out its exact shape. But now, mathematicians from three universities have found a surprise. They made two donut-shaped surfaces, called tori, that have the same distances and bending at every point, but the shapes are different. This breaks the old rule. It shows that even with all the local details, you can't always know the whole shape. The discovery solves a problem that people have been trying to solve for decades.

articles.title: Comedians Love Performing on Saturday Night Live UK
articles.summary: Comedians George Fouracres and Celeste Dring talk about their exciting and scary experience performing on Saturday Night Live UK. This is a TV show that is live, meaning it happens in real time without stopping. They say it is a dream job but also terrifying because they have to perform in front of an audience and things can change at the last minute. The show has a big audience and features famous guest hosts and live music. George and Celeste grew up near each other and went to the same school and university. They feel lucky to work together and show the world where they come from. They rely on cue cards and each other to get through the live performance, which makes them close friends.

articles.title: Foo Fighters: A New Sound After Losing a Friend
articles.summary: The Foo Fighters are a famous rock band that made a new album called Your Favourite Toy. Dave Grohl, the singer, says the band is different now because their drummer Taylor Hawkins passed away. This album is faster and louder than their older music. Dave wrote songs about feeling confused and angry, like when he met someone from his past who sold drugs. He recorded the music quickly to capture his feelings. The band tried many ideas, with Dave making over 50 demos at night. This album shows how the band is changing and dealing with hard times.

articles.title: A Movie About Wrestling Becomes a Stage Show
articles.summary: A movie called Fighting With My Family, which is about a real-life wrestler named Paige, is being turned into a musical play. The movie tells the story of Paige, who comes from a family of wrestlers in Britain and works hard to join WWE in America. Dwayne Johnson, a famous actor and wrestler, helped make the movie and is now helping with the musical. The musical is being created by a company called Tilted Musicals, and they want it to be fun for everyone, not just wrestling fans. They say wrestling is like a play because it has heroes and villains and tells stories. The musical will have songs written by Miranda Cooper and Nick Coler, who have written music for popular singers. The story is about family, love, and following your dreams.
